lines.speaker: Runvastr
lines.text: Oh, leave an old dwarf in peace will you?

lines.speaker: Runvastr
lines.text: Ninenty years down in the mines, and this is all I got out of it. All my life wasted away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You've still got a nice house, don't you?

lines.speaker: Runvastr
lines.text: A crummy old house in East, that's all my life amounts to.
